category_sources: Official GO Feature Flag relay-proxy docs describe it as the backend/API layer for feature flag management.
source_facts.description says it is a stand-alone server to run GO Feature Flag.
display_name_sources: Official documentation uses GO Feature Flag Relay Proxy.
source_facts.name identifies the package as go-feature-flag-relay-proxy.
docs_sources: Dedicated official GO Feature Flag documentation covers relay proxy overview, getting started, and configuration.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/thomaspoignant/go-feature-flag; per instructions repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official docs describe relay proxy APIs, OpenFeature SDK usage, and stateless feature flag serving.
source_facts.description identifies the stand-alone GO Feature Flag server.
